_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: Performance metrics for intra- and interuser accuracy and precision were achieved and provide supporting data for CLIA validation of the PRIMABs-DX, AML-Flow test
details: Successfully detected BCL-2 family protein-protein interactions in cell lines and patient samples, with performance metrics achieved for intra- and interuser accuracy and precision supporting CLIA validation
